faq.title: Earn Apple Gift Cards in {country} - FAQ

items.question: How do I earn Apple gift cards?
items.answer: You can earn Apple gift cards by playing iOS games, completing surveys, testing apps, finishing offers, and referring friends. Each activity rewards you with points that can be redeemed for Apple Store, iTunes, or App Store credit.

items.question: Are these Apple gift cards real?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely! We provide legitimate Apple gift card codes that work on the App Store, iTunes Store, and Apple Store worldwide. We partner with trusted offer providers to ensure all rewards are genuine.

items.question: How long does it take to get my first Apple gift card?
items.answer: Most users earn their first $5 Apple gift card within 24-48 hours of signing up. Some high-paying iOS game offers can get you there in under an hour!

items.question: Do Apple gift cards expire?
items.answer: Apple gift cards never expire. You can save them for as long as you want or combine multiple cards for bigger purchases on the App Store, iTunes, or Apple Store.

items.question: Can I use these in {country}?
items.answer: Yes! Apple gift cards work perfectly in {country}. Just make sure to redeem them on your local App Store or iTunes store for the correct currency.

items.question: Is there a minimum payout amount?
items.answer: Yes, you can redeem your first Apple gift card starting from just $5 earned. Higher denominations like $10, $15, $25, $50, and $100 are also available.

items.question: How do I redeem my Apple gift card?
items.answer: Once you have enough points, go to the Rewards section, select Apple Gift Card, choose your amount ($5-$100), and click Redeem. The code will be sent instantly to your email. Then open the App Store app and tap your profile photo > 'Redeem Gift Card or Code'.

items.question: Is this really free?
items.answer: Yes, signing up and earning is completely free. There are no hidden fees or subscriptions. You just complete activities and get paid in Apple gift cards.

items.question: Can I earn on iPhone or iPad?
items.answer: Absolutely! Our platform works perfectly on iOS devices. Download games directly from the App Store and complete offers on your iPhone or iPad.

items.question: What can I buy with Apple gift cards?
items.answer: Apple gift cards can be used to buy apps, games, in-app purchases, Apple Music subscriptions, iCloud storage, movies, TV shows, books, and even physical Apple products like AirPods, cases, and accessories.

items.question: How much can I earn per month?
items.answer: Most active users earn $50-200 in Apple gift cards per month. Some power users earn $500+ by completing high-value iOS app testing offers and referring friends.

items.question: Can I use Apple gift cards for Apple Arcade?
items.answer: Yes! Apple gift cards can be used to pay for Apple Arcade subscriptions, along with Apple Music, Apple TV+, and iCloud+ storage plans.
